---
title: "Demo"
output: flexdashboard::flex_dashboard
runtime: shiny

---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(igraph)
library(visNetwork)
library(flexdashboard)
library(shiny)
```

Column {.sidebar}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------


```{r}
numericInput("n","Number of nodes",value = 10)
sliderInput("children","Number of children",1,10,2)
```

Column
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Grap viz
```{r}
renderVisNetwork({
  make_tree(input$n,input$children) %>% visIgraph(layout = "layout_as_tree",circular=T)
})
```
